response.justification: Bogdan brings directly relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at his current role (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks), which maps cleanly onto the AI-native engineering environment described. His Dunnhumby tenure demonstrates genuine high-throughput distributed systems work at scale — millions of HTTP requests per second, async I/O, low-latency design — and his Staff Engineer titling appears across multiple employers. However, Python is a stated must-have and is entirely absent from both his skills section and all employment history, which is a hard gap. Evidence of cross-functional stakeholder management, technical strategy at scale, and agile ceremony leadership is also thin on the resume, leaving the cross-functional influence dimension of the role unvalidated.
strengths: Current role includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — directly matching the AI-native engineering baseline the role treats as a prerequisite
Dunnhumby experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second with async I/O, fibers, and low-latency caching demonstrates real high-throughput distributed systems depth

Staff Engineer title appears at multiple employers and is complemented by open source platform ownership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) and community knowledge-sharing, signaling both seniority and an ownership mindset
concerns: Python — listed as a must-have technical skill — is entirely absent from the skills inventory and unmentioned across fifteen years of employment history, representing a hard requirement gap
Distributed systems depth is concentrated in the 2018–2020 Dunnhumby role; subsequent work skews toward product-layer TypeScript and tooling rather than infrastructure-scale architecture

Resume provides no concrete evidence of cross-functional stakeholder management, driving technical decisions at organizational scale, or rotating scrum champion responsibilities, all of which are explicit role requirements
